# Dabar Grammar English

> Advanced English grammar in editorial articles — full articles in **English**, **Portuguese**, and **Spanish** (MDX). Replace `https://YOUR_DOMAIN` with your deployed `NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL`.

## Start here

- [Portuguese home](https://YOUR_DOMAIN/pt): article index (default locale)
- [English home](https://YOUR_DOMAIN/en): article index
- [Spanish home](https://YOUR_DOMAIN/es): article index

## Search

- [Search (pt)](https://YOUR_DOMAIN/pt/search)
- [Search (en)](https://YOUR_DOMAIN/en/search)
- [Search (es)](https://YOUR_DOMAIN/es/search)

## High-intent topic hubs (trilingual)

- [Verb tenses in use (en)](https://YOUR_DOMAIN/en/verb-tenses-in-use) — [pt](https://YOUR_DOMAIN/pt/verb-tenses-in-use) — [es](https://YOUR_DOMAIN/es/verb-tenses-in-use)
- [Conditionals & modality (en)](https://YOUR_DOMAIN/en/english-conditionals-modality) — [pt](https://YOUR_DOMAIN/pt/english-conditionals-modality) — [es](https://YOUR_DOMAIN/es/english-conditionals-modality)
- [Prepositions & articles (en)](https://YOUR_DOMAIN/en/prepositions-and-articles) — [pt](https://YOUR_DOMAIN/pt/prepositions-and-articles) — [es](https://YOUR_DOMAIN/es/prepositions-and-articles)
- [Punctuation & clauses (en)](https://YOUR_DOMAIN/en/sentence-punctuation-and-clauses) — [pt](https://YOUR_DOMAIN/pt/sentence-punctuation-and-clauses) — [es](https://YOUR_DOMAIN/es/sentence-punctuation-and-clauses)
- [Academic writing grammar (en)](https://YOUR_DOMAIN/en/academic-writing-grammar) — [pt](https://YOUR_DOMAIN/pt/academic-writing-grammar) — [es](https://YOUR_DOMAIN/es/academic-writing-grammar)
- [L1 interference PT/ES (en)](https://YOUR_DOMAIN/en/l1-interference-pt-es) — [pt](https://YOUR_DOMAIN/pt/l1-interference-pt-es) — [es](https://YOUR_DOMAIN/es/l1-interference-pt-es)
